localizedDescriptions.en: Generic container for information provided by an individual.
General document-level metadata complementary to COMPOSITION.
When the document was authorised or approved.
When the document content was created.
When the document was published or registered in a target repository.
Level of confidentiality/privacy for the document.
Reference to an external media or document.
Simple organisational details related to the document.
Organisation that performed the activity documented.
Organisation that publishes/makes the document available.
Organisation responsible for custody of the record.
14-item screening scale with two 7-item subscales (Anxiety and Depression). Each item is scored 0–3; higher scores indicate greater symptom severity. Subscales range 0–21 and the total score 0–42.

localizedDescriptions.en: Interpretation band for the HADS Anxiety subscale.
Based on the Anxiety subscale score (0–21).

annotations.comment:
There is consensus that questionnaires with less than 50% of responses in their corresponding dimensions 
have too much bias to be included. Therefore, this minimum percentage of responses is required 
(https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27770833/

localizedDescriptions.en: Interpretation band for the HADS Depression subscale.
Based on the Depression subscale score (0–21).

annotations.comment:
There is consensus that questionnaires with less than 50% of responses in their corresponding dimensions 
have too much bias to be included. Therefore, this minimum percentage of responses is required 
(https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27770833/
